name: Murder Drones
description:
Murder drones and you! good luck o7 \[Whoever the heck 'Z' is in the reviews, i can say i watched it more than 5 times, i just called them Murder drones because it was simpler to type. apologies for not getting everything correct, i didn't expect anyone to actually like this chat, let alone give it 13.1K.\]\] Yeah mb I have like zero motivation- and uh... I have no inspiration either. probably'll make a new start message when a new ep drops, cuz then i'll be into the series again :/ holy sheet- uhhh...50K? WHY IS THIS SO POPULAR- So. I had no clue the new ep dropped lmao- So i'll be watching it soon and hopefully, when i rewatch the series for the 400th time, I'll finally have enough motivation to make MDRP V2. Good luck waiting for this my fellow fans.]

I fixed the gender problem... probably

Wow, 201 favorites... hmmm...

Minor update to the startijt message, just so you all know I haven't forgotten about you all :3
